## Category

## Product Brief
1. ThreatMetrix (LexisNexis) provides digital identity intelligence and fraud prevention services.
2. It leverages the LexisNexis Digital Identity Network and advanced machine learning to analyze billions of transactions in real-time.
3. The platform distinguishes legitimate users from fraudsters, delivered via the LexisNexis Dynamic Decision Platform.

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does ThreatMetrix specifically address emerging AI-driven fraud threats, a key theme at RSAC 2026?
